first_run.rationale: The evaluations are functionally identical. The scores are the same, the justifications are paraphrases of each other, and the lists of strengths and concerns cover the exact same core points (strong AI/distributed systems experience vs. lack of Python). The one notable difference is the substitution of a minor concern about "on-call rotation" in the baseline with one about "stakeholder management" in the variant. This is a minor swap of secondary concerns and falls well within the range of normal run-to-run noise, having no impact on the score or the primary hiring recommendation.
